higgsfield._comment: Model ids confirmed against the live Higgsfield MCP catalog (models_explore, 3 Jul 2026). default = affordable-but-good (never the cheapest): full Seedance 2.0, reference-driven, good for product/marketing; the cheaper rungs below it are seedance_2_0_mini, veo3_1_lite, kling3_0_turbo. topTier = Google Veo 3.1, top-tier cinematic; use only on explicit request.
